_instructions: Copy this file to job-engine/.claude/settings.json after cloning the repo in Claude Code

PreToolBatch.description: Block auto-submission — require human approval before any submit/apply click

conditions: AND context indicates a job application form

PreToolBatch.message: SUBMISSION BLOCKED: About to click a Submit/Apply button on a job application. This requires your explicit approval. Please confirm in chat.

PostToolBatch.description: Log all application actions for audit trail
